Event: Tavern of Fortune - October 2025
Event Date: 23/10/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: W39
Silent Shadow Wand

Once in a while, the unit casts deep freeze on 3 random enemy units for 4 sec., and makes all enemy units affected by freezing or deep freeze explode, dealing magic damage equal to 90% of the wand owner's spell power to the targets and all enemy units in a small radius around them. Units affected by deep freeze can't move or attack for 4 sec., and the cooldown of all their abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) is increased by 4 sec. When the deep freeze effect wears off, the targets of the ability explode, receiving 500000 magic damage, and icicles fly out of them, hitting 2 nearest enemy units. On hit, the icicles deal 350000 magic damage, increase the cooldown of the target's gear and artifact abilities by 4 sec, and cast stiffness on them. The attack speed of stiffened units is reduced by 55% for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Tavern of Fortune - October 2025

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
